Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class ForeignNaturalPersonAccountEnrollmentMetadataCreate

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.ForeignNaturalPersonAccountEnrollmentMetadataCreate
public class ForeignNaturalPersonAccountEnrollmentMetadataCreate extends Object
ForeignNaturalPersonAccountEnrollmentMetadataCreate - Enrollment metadata for Accounts that have a foreign Legal Natural Person owner.
